Support for Bitcoin, Litecoin, Dogecoin: Support for Bitcoin, Litecoin, Dogecoin and Bitcoin Cash networks. Each co-signer/device has a unique private key/recovery phrase, and all signatures are recorded directly on the blockchain.
Support for Ethereum (ERC-20) tokens, Bi: Support for Ethereum (ERC-20) tokens, Bitcoin, Bitcoin Cash, Litecoin, Dogecoin, and XRP. A single private key is split into keyshares across co-signers, combining approvals into one transaction.

TokensOnArbNetworkDescription: Tokens on the Arbitrum network need an Arbitrum Ethereum wallet to pay for fees.
TokensOnBaseNetworkDescription: Tokens on the Base network need a Base Ethereum wallet to pay for fees.
TokensOnEthereumNetworkDescription: Tokens on the Ethereum network need an Ethereum wallet to pay for fees.
TokensOnOpNetworkDescription: Tokens on the Optimism network need an Optimism Ethereum wallet to pay for fees.
TokensOnPolygonNetworkDescription: Tokens on the Polygon network need a Polygon wallet to pay for fees.
TokensOnSolanaNetworkDescription: Tokens on the Solana network need a Solana wallet to pay for fees.

U.S. residents may use the BitPay Card o: U.S. residents may use the BitPay Card online or in-store wherever major debit cards are accepted. It can also be used as an ATM card to instantly convert your Bitcoin or other cryptocurrencies into dollars. Use it to travel, entertain, buy gift cards, invest, treat yourself, and live on crypto!
